hero_badge: Turn Screen Time Into Future Skills
hero_subtitle: Interactive platform where kids 8-15 can practice building robotics and games using built-in simulators. Safe, structured, and fun!
hero_mission_desc: Great, the LED light is on!
problem_title: Does Your Child Spend Time on Gadgets Without Real Skills?
problem_item1_desc: Too much entertainment without interaction or tangible output.
problem_item2_desc: Playing others' games but not knowing how to create their own.
problem_item3_desc: Want to learn robotics but worried about Arduino cost and setup.
solution_title: With Kodibot, Kids Learn Through Practice, Not Just Watching
solution_desc: We turn your child from "Tech Consumer" into "Tech Creator". All content is designed interactively so even complex concepts are easy for kids to grasp.
solution_step1_desc: Structured learning from scratch with instructions on the left that must be completed before advancing.
solution_step2_desc: No app install needed. Kids code and press 'Play' to see results in the virtual simulator.
solution_step3_desc: Learn real Arduino without risk! Cables, LEDs, servos—all on screen with realistic physics.
how_it_works_subtitle: Three simple steps to ensure kids truly understand the material.
how_it_works_step1_desc: Watch short animated videos or read interactive comics explaining coding logic basics.
how_it_works_step2_desc: Complete challenges in the Interactive Simulator. If wrong, kids learn self-debugging.
how_it_works_step3_desc: After completing core modules, kids freely create robot/game projects in the "Playground".
simulator_title: World-Class Simulator Integrated Into the Curriculum
simulator_desc: Kodibot doesn't just use public simulators. Our Blockly & Arduino simulator is built into learning missions. The system auto-detects when wiring or code is correct!
simulator_item1: Smart Validation System - Auto-corrects kids' assembly without parent intervention.
simulator_item2: Blockly to Text - Kids build with visual blocks and see real C++ structure (Smooth transition to Pro level).
simulator_item3: Just Open Browser - No need to download gigabytes like heavy software.
learning_path_subtitle: We don't throw kids at random videos. Your child climbs a ladder of appropriate difficulty.
learning_path_1_desc: Learn looping, conditions, and variables through games and animations.
learning_path_2_desc: Transition from screen to virtual physical devices. Sensor and Micro:bit interaction.
learning_path_3_desc: Build circuits, breadboard, and structured C++ programming via visual blocks.
learning_path_4_desc: Ready for real hardware. Implement on physical Arduino without fear.
outcome_title: After Completing Kodibot, Your Child Will Be Able To:
outcome_1_desc: Stop just playing and start creating. Boost creativity.
outcome_2_desc: Understand basic electrical logic, sensors, and components without burning anything at home.
outcome_3_desc: Break big problems into step-by-step solutions. Foundation for future success.
outcome_4_desc: With C++ foundation, competing at elementary and middle school level becomes easy.
comparison_subtitle: We design a fundamentally different future for education.
hw_comparison_title: Physical Hardware Cost vs. Kodibot Simulator
hw_comparison_subtitle: Imagine how much you can save when every component can be simulated right on your screen.
pricing_subtitle: Get lifetime access to all courses or purchase individual courses.
pricing_f1: Access ALL Scratch, MakeCode, Arduino courses
pricing_per_course_subtitle: Choose individual courses as your child progresses. Many courses are free to try — register and start learning immediately.
faq_q1: Is this platform suitable for kids with no coding experience?
faq_a1: Absolutely! Kodibot curriculum is designed from scratch. We start with visual block coding (like Lego) in Scratch, so kids won't be overwhelmed by complex text code.
faq_q2: Do I need to buy hardware like physical Arduino before learning?
faq_a2: No! That's Kodibot's main advantage. All classes include in-browser Interactive Simulator. Kids can wire virtual cables, light virtual LEDs, and test sensors without physical hardware. You're only recommended to buy physical (optional) after they complete and understand the basics.
faq_a3: Yes! Many introductory courses like Scratch Basics and MakeCode Intro are completely free. Just sign up — no credit card required — and your child can start learning immediately.
faq_q4: How long to complete the course?
faq_a4: We use self-paced learning. Kids learn anytime at their own speed. On average, kids complete 1 module in 30-45 minutes.
faq_q5: Will my child get a certificate?
faq_a5: Yes. E-Certificate is issued automatically when kids complete major milestones. Can be used in portfolios for school applications.
cta_title: Give Your Child Future-Proof Skills Today.
cta_subtitle: Join the Kodibot Parents community that cares about STEM.
whatsapp_floating_tooltip: Got questions? Free consultation — chat now!
footer_copyright: Kodibot Learning Platform. Coding & Arduino Learning for Kids.
meta_title: KODIBOT – Coding & STEM Learning Platform for Kids 8-15
meta_description: Learn coding and Arduino from scratch with interactive simulator. No hardware purchase needed. Perfect for kids 8-15. Free courses available.
meta_keywords: kids coding, online coding course for kids, Arduino for kids, STEM platform for kids, coding for beginners kids
learning_path_title_v2: Two Paths, One Goal: Build & Create
learning_path_subtitle_v2: Kids choose their journey — or take both. Each path builds real skills from day one.
learning_path_electronics_desc: Circuits, LEDs, resistors — interactive simulator with real-time feedback.
learning_path_subtitle_v3: Begin with coding or electronics — both paths lead to creating real projects.
electronics_title: Learn Basic Electronics Without Fear of Short Circuits
electronics_subtitle: Interactive simulator teaching circuits, polarity, and electronic components through hands-on practice right in the browser. 100% safe, 100% free.
electronics_f1_desc: Build circuits with drag-and-drop. Battery, LED, resistor, switch — all react in real-time with realistic physics.
electronics_f2_desc: Guess which materials conduct electricity. Visual current animations answer right or wrong instantly.
electronics_f3_desc: Deliberately create a short circuit — watch wires heat up, smoke, and components burn. Learn the danger with zero real risk.
electronics_f4_desc: Install LEDs correctly level by level. From a single light to traffic lights — debug reversed polarity.
electronics_cta_desc: All basic electronics features are available free — the perfect preparation before your child moves to Arduino and C++ coding.
tm_title: Train Your Own AI, No Code Required
tm_subtitle: Kids collect images, sounds, or poses — then watch the machine learn in real-time. A hands-on intro to Machine Learning that feels like magic.
tm_step1_desc: Use the webcam or microphone to gather images, sounds, or poses for each category.
tm_step2_desc: Press train and watch the AI learn to tell the difference between your categories — live.
tm_step3_desc: Show the camera new examples and see if the AI gets it right. Adjust and retrain anytime.
tm_f1_desc: Point the camera at objects and the AI learns to sort them. Rock vs scissors, cat vs dog — you decide the categories.
tm_f2_desc: Clap, snap, or speak — the AI learns to recognize different sounds and respond in real-time.
tm_f3_desc: Strike a pose and the AI maps body landmarks. Build gesture-controlled games and interactive art.
tm_f4_desc: Download your trained model or share it with friends. Take your AI project from classroom to the real world.
tm_cta_desc: Teachable Machine runs entirely in the browser — no install, no account, no cost. Perfect first step into Machine Learning for kids.
